title: ⚡ 行车 vs 停车能耗（月度）

list.definition: 车辆选择器（来自 cars 表）
list.label: 车辆
list.name: car_id
list.query:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text 
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC;

options.content:
## ⚡ 行车 vs 停车能耗（月度）
每月用电分 **🚗 行车** / **🅿️ 停车**；停车再分 **☀️ 醒着掉电**（停 >15 分钟没休眠）/ **😴 休眠掉电**。

- 同时兼容额定续航与理想续航；两者都缺失时，行车电耗按行驶里程估算。
- 车辆效率缺失时，优先从历史充电记录估算；仍无法估算时使用 153 Wh/km 作为保守参考值。
- 月度图会补齐空月份；没有符合条件的数据时显示 0，而不是空白。

> 「醒着掉电」包含车内停留、空调、预热和可能的哨兵模式。可结合下方明细中的“空调约开”和“判断”进一步分析。

targets.rawSql:
WITH eff AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    NULLIF(c.efficiency, 0),
    (
      SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
        ORDER BY cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(
          COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) -
          COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km),
          0
        )
      )
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
        AND COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) >
            COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km)
    ),
    0.153
  ) AS e
  FROM cars c
  WHERE c.id = $car_id
),
drive_points AS (
  SELECT
    d.*,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.start_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_start,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.end_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.end_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_end,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km - d.end_rated_range_km
      WHEN d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km
      ELSE d.distance
    END AS drive_km
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
)
SELECT COALESCE(
  ROUND(SUM(d.drive_km * eff.e)::numeric, 1),
  0
) AS v
FROM drive_points d
CROSS JOIN eff
WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND d.drive_km >= 0.1
  AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)

WITH eff AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    NULLIF(c.efficiency, 0),
    (
      SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
        ORDER BY cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(
          COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) -
          COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km),
          0
        )
      )
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
        AND COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) >
            COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km)
    ),
    0.153
  ) AS e
  FROM cars c
  WHERE c.id = $car_id
),
drive_points AS (
  SELECT
    d.*,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.start_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_start,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.end_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.end_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_end,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km - d.end_rated_range_km
      WHEN d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km
      ELSE d.distance
    END AS drive_km
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
),
gaps AS (
  SELECT
    d.end_date AS ps,
    d.r_end AS r0,
    LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS pe,
    LEAD(d.r_start) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS r1
  FROM drive_points d
  WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_start IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_end IS NOT NULL
),
clean AS (
  SELECT g.ps, g.pe, GREATEST(g.r0 - g.r1, 0) AS drop_km
  FROM gaps g
  WHERE g.pe IS NOT NULL
    AND g.pe > g.ps
    AND g.r1 IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.start_date >= g.ps
        AND cp.start_date < g.pe
    )
)
SELECT COALESCE(
  ROUND((SUM(c.drop_km * eff.e))::numeric, 1),
  0
) AS v
FROM clean c
CROSS JOIN eff
WHERE $__timeFilter(c.ps)

WITH eff AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    NULLIF(c.efficiency, 0),
    (
      SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
        ORDER BY cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(
          COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) -
          COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km),
          0
        )
      )
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
        AND COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) >
            COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km)
    ),
    0.153
  ) AS e
  FROM cars c
  WHERE c.id = $car_id
),
drive_points AS (
  SELECT
    d.*,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.start_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_start,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.end_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.end_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_end,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km - d.end_rated_range_km
      WHEN d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km
      ELSE d.distance
    END AS drive_km
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
),
drv AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.drive_km * eff.e), 0) AS kwh
  FROM drive_points d
  CROSS JOIN eff
  WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.drive_km >= 0.1
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
),
gaps AS (
  SELECT
    d.end_date AS ps,
    d.r_end AS r0,
    LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS pe,
    LEAD(d.r_start) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS r1
  FROM drive_points d
  WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_start IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_end IS NOT NULL
),
clean AS (
  SELECT g.ps, g.pe, GREATEST(g.r0 - g.r1, 0) AS drop_km
  FROM gaps g
  WHERE g.pe IS NOT NULL
    AND g.pe > g.ps
    AND g.r1 IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.start_date >= g.ps
        AND cp.start_date < g.pe
    )
),
park AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.drop_km * eff.e), 0) AS kwh
  FROM clean c
  CROSS JOIN eff
  WHERE $__timeFilter(c.ps)
)
SELECT COALESCE(
  ROUND((park.kwh / NULLIF(drv.kwh + park.kwh, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1),
  0
) AS v
FROM drv CROSS JOIN park

panels.title: ☀️ 醒着(未及时休眠)停车 (次)

targets.rawSql:
WITH drive_points AS (
  SELECT
    d.*,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.start_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_start,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.end_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.end_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_end,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km - d.end_rated_range_km
      WHEN d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km
      ELSE d.distance
    END AS drive_km
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
),
gaps AS (
  SELECT
    d.end_date AS ps,
    d.r_end AS r0,
    LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS pe,
    LEAD(d.r_start) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS r1
  FROM drive_points d
  WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_start IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_end IS NOT NULL
),
clean AS (
  SELECT g.ps, g.pe, GREATEST(g.r0 - g.r1, 0) AS drop_km
  FROM gaps g
  WHERE g.pe IS NOT NULL
    AND g.pe > g.ps
    AND g.r1 IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.start_date >= g.ps
        AND cp.start_date < g.pe
    )
),
park_online AS (
  SELECT
    c.ps,
    c.pe,
    c.drop_km,
    COALESCE(
      SUM(
        EXTRACT(
          EPOCH FROM (
            LEAST(COALESCE(s.end_date, c.pe), c.pe) -
            GREATEST(s.start_date, c.ps)
          )
        )
      ) FILTER (WHERE s.state = 'online'),
      0
    ) / 3600.0 AS online_h
  FROM clean c
  LEFT JOIN states s
    ON s.car_id = $car_id
   AND s.start_date < c.pe
   AND COALESCE(s.end_date, c.pe) > c.ps
  GROUP BY c.ps, c.pe, c.drop_km
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS v
FROM park_online
WHERE online_h > 0.25
  AND $__timeFilter(ps)

WITH eff AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    NULLIF(c.efficiency, 0),
    (
      SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
        ORDER BY cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(
          COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) -
          COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km),
          0
        )
      )
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
        AND COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) >
            COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km)
    ),
    0.153
  ) AS e
  FROM cars c
  WHERE c.id = $car_id
),
drive_points AS (
  SELECT
    d.*,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.start_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_start,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.end_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.end_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_end,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km - d.end_rated_range_km
      WHEN d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km
      ELSE d.distance
    END AS drive_km
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
),
drv AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.drive_km * eff.e), 0) AS kwh
  FROM drive_points d
  CROSS JOIN eff
  WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.drive_km >= 0.1
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
),
gaps AS (
  SELECT
    d.end_date AS ps,
    d.r_end AS r0,
    LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS pe,
    LEAD(d.r_start) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS r1
  FROM drive_points d
  WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_start IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_end IS NOT NULL
),
clean AS (
  SELECT g.ps, g.pe, GREATEST(g.r0 - g.r1, 0) AS drop_km
  FROM gaps g
  WHERE g.pe IS NOT NULL
    AND g.pe > g.ps
    AND g.r1 IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.start_date >= g.ps
        AND cp.start_date < g.pe
    )
),
park AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.drop_km * eff.e), 0) AS kwh
  FROM clean c
  CROSS JOIN eff
  WHERE $__timeFilter(c.ps)
)
SELECT
  ROUND(drv.kwh::numeric, 1) AS "🚗 行车",
  ROUND(park.kwh::numeric, 1) AS "🅿️ 停车"
FROM drv CROSS JOIN park

panels.title: 📊 月度能耗：行车 vs 停车 (kWh)

targets.rawSql:
WITH eff AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    NULLIF(c.efficiency, 0),
    (
      SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
        ORDER BY cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(
          COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) -
          COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km),
          0
        )
      )
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
        AND COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) >
            COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km)
    ),
    0.153
  ) AS e
  FROM cars c
  WHERE c.id = $car_id
),
drive_points AS (
  SELECT
    d.*,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.start_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_start,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.end_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.end_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_end,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km - d.end_rated_range_km
      WHEN d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km
      ELSE d.distance
    END AS drive_km
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
),
months AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc('month', timezone('$__timezone', $__timeFrom())),
    date_trunc('month', timezone('$__timezone', $__timeTo())),
    interval '1 month'
  ) AS m
),
drive_m AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', timezone('$__timezone', timezone('UTC', d.start_date))) AS m,
    SUM(d.drive_km * eff.e) AS kwh
  FROM drive_points d
  CROSS JOIN eff
  WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.drive_km >= 0.1
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
  GROUP BY 1
),
gaps AS (
  SELECT
    d.end_date AS ps,
    d.r_end AS r0,
    LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS pe,
    LEAD(d.r_start) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS r1
  FROM drive_points d
  WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_start IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_end IS NOT NULL
),
clean AS (
  SELECT g.ps, g.pe, GREATEST(g.r0 - g.r1, 0) AS drop_km
  FROM gaps g
  WHERE g.pe IS NOT NULL
    AND g.pe > g.ps
    AND g.r1 IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.start_date >= g.ps
        AND cp.start_date < g.pe
    )
),
park_m AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', timezone('$__timezone', timezone('UTC', c.ps))) AS m,
    SUM(c.drop_km * eff.e) AS kwh
  FROM clean c
  CROSS JOIN eff
  WHERE $__timeFilter(c.ps)
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  to_char(months.m, 'YYYY-MM') AS "月份",
  ROUND(COALESCE(drive_m.kwh, 0)::numeric, 1) AS "行车电耗",
  ROUND(COALESCE(park_m.kwh, 0)::numeric, 1) AS "停车电耗"
FROM months
LEFT JOIN drive_m ON drive_m.m = months.m
LEFT JOIN park_m ON park_m.m = months.m
ORDER BY months.m

panels.title: 🅿️ 月度停车拆分：醒着掉电 vs 休眠掉电 (kWh)

targets.rawSql:
WITH eff AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    NULLIF(c.efficiency, 0),
    (
      SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
        ORDER BY cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(
          COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) -
          COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km),
          0
        )
      )
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
        AND COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) >
            COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km)
    ),
    0.153
  ) AS e
  FROM cars c
  WHERE c.id = $car_id
),
drive_points AS (
  SELECT
    d.*,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.start_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_start,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.end_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.end_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_end,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km - d.end_rated_range_km
      WHEN d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km
      ELSE d.distance
    END AS drive_km
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
),
months AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc('month', timezone('$__timezone', $__timeFrom())),
    date_trunc('month', timezone('$__timezone', $__timeTo())),
    interval '1 month'
  ) AS m
),
gaps AS (
  SELECT
    d.end_date AS ps,
    d.r_end AS r0,
    LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS pe,
    LEAD(d.r_start) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS r1
  FROM drive_points d
  WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_start IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_end IS NOT NULL
),
clean AS (
  SELECT g.ps, g.pe, GREATEST(g.r0 - g.r1, 0) AS drop_km
  FROM gaps g
  WHERE g.pe IS NOT NULL
    AND g.pe > g.ps
    AND g.r1 IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.start_date >= g.ps
        AND cp.start_date < g.pe
    )
),
park_online AS (
  SELECT
    c.ps,
    c.pe,
    c.drop_km,
    COALESCE(
      SUM(
        EXTRACT(
          EPOCH FROM (
            LEAST(COALESCE(s.end_date, c.pe), c.pe) -
            GREATEST(s.start_date, c.ps)
          )
        )
      ) FILTER (WHERE s.state = 'online'),
      0
    ) / 3600.0 AS online_h
  FROM clean c
  LEFT JOIN states s
    ON s.car_id = $car_id
   AND s.start_date < c.pe
   AND COALESCE(s.end_date, c.pe) > c.ps
  GROUP BY c.ps, c.pe, c.drop_km
),
park_m AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', timezone('$__timezone', timezone('UTC', p.ps))) AS m,
    SUM(p.drop_km * eff.e) FILTER (WHERE p.online_h > 0.25) AS awake_kwh,
    SUM(p.drop_km * eff.e) FILTER (WHERE p.online_h <= 0.25) AS sleep_kwh
  FROM park_online p
  CROSS JOIN eff
  WHERE $__timeFilter(p.ps)
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  to_char(months.m, 'YYYY-MM') AS "月份",
  ROUND(COALESCE(park_m.awake_kwh, 0)::numeric, 1) AS "☀️ 醒着掉电",
  ROUND(COALESCE(park_m.sleep_kwh, 0)::numeric, 1) AS "😴 休眠掉电"
FROM months
LEFT JOIN park_m ON park_m.m = months.m
ORDER BY months.m

panels.description: 醒着掉电 = 停车 >15 分钟没休眠时掉的电（你坐车里/空调/预热/哨兵的混合）；休眠掉电 = 车正常休眠待机时的耗电。

panels.title: 🔍 醒着停车明细（停 >15 分钟没休眠）

targets.rawSql:
WITH eff AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    NULLIF(c.efficiency, 0),
    (
      SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
        ORDER BY cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(
          COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) -
          COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km),
          0
        )
      )
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
        AND COALESCE(cp.end_rated_range_km, cp.end_ideal_range_km) >
            COALESCE(cp.start_rated_range_km, cp.start_ideal_range_km)
    ),
    0.153
  ) AS e
  FROM cars c
  WHERE c.id = $car_id
),
drive_points AS (
  SELECT
    d.*,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.start_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_start,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.end_rated_range_km
      ELSE d.end_ideal_range_km
    END AS r_end,
    CASE
      WHEN d.start_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_rated_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_rated_range_km - d.end_rated_range_km
      WHEN d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
        THEN d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km
      ELSE d.distance
    END AS drive_km
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
),
gaps AS (
  SELECT
    d.end_date AS ps,
    d.r_end AS r0,
    LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS pe,
    LEAD(d.r_start) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS r1
  FROM drive_points d
  WHERE d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_start IS NOT NULL
    AND d.r_end IS NOT NULL
),
clean AS (
  SELECT g.ps, g.pe, GREATEST(g.r0 - g.r1, 0) AS drop_km
  FROM gaps g
  WHERE g.pe IS NOT NULL
    AND g.pe > g.ps
    AND g.r1 IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM charging_processes cp
      WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
        AND cp.start_date >= g.ps
        AND cp.start_date < g.pe
    )
),
park_online AS (
  SELECT
    c.ps,
    c.pe,
    c.drop_km,
    COALESCE(
      SUM(
        EXTRACT(
          EPOCH FROM (
            LEAST(COALESCE(s.end_date, c.pe), c.pe) -
            GREATEST(s.start_date, c.ps)
          )
        )
      ) FILTER (WHERE s.state = 'online'),
      0
    ) / 3600.0 AS online_h
  FROM clean c
  LEFT JOIN states s
    ON s.car_id = $car_id
   AND s.start_date < c.pe
   AND COALESCE(s.end_date, c.pe) > c.ps
  GROUP BY c.ps, c.pe, c.drop_km
),
top AS (
  SELECT ps, pe, drop_km, online_h
  FROM park_online
  WHERE online_h > 0.25
    AND $__timeFilter(ps)
  ORDER BY drop_km DESC
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT
  to_char(timezone('$__timezone', timezone('UTC', top.ps)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "停车开始",
  ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (top.pe - top.ps)) / 3600)::numeric, 1) AS "停车时长(h)",
  ROUND((top.online_h * 60)::numeric, 0) AS "醒着(分钟)",
  ROUND(((cs.n_clim::numeric / NULLIF(cs.n, 0)) * top.online_h * 60)::numeric, 0) AS "空调约开(分钟)",
  ROUND(cs.out_t::numeric, 0) AS "室外温度℃",
  CASE
    WHEN cs.n = 0 THEN '无温度数据'
    WHEN cs.n_clim::float / NULLIF(cs.n, 0) < 0.15 THEN '空调基本没开·可能哨兵'
    WHEN cs.in_clim > cs.out_clim + 2 THEN '制热·可能有人在车'
    ELSE '制冷·过热或开AC'
  END AS "判断",
  ROUND((top.drop_km * eff.e)::numeric, 2) AS "停车电耗(kWh)"
FROM top
CROSS JOIN eff
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.is_climate_on) AS n_clim,
    AVG(p.outside_temp) AS out_t,
    AVG(p.inside_temp) FILTER (WHERE p.is_climate_on) AS in_clim,
    AVG(p.outside_temp) FILTER (WHERE p.is_climate_on) AS out_clim
  FROM positions p
  WHERE p.car_id = $car_id
    AND p.date >= top.ps
    AND p.date <= top.pe
) cs ON TRUE
ORDER BY top.drop_km DESC

defaults.noValue: 暂无符合条件的停车记录

panels.description: 「空调约开(分钟)」= 估算空调实际开了多久（≠醒着时长）。判断：空调开得久且制热≈有人在车；制冷≈过热/AC；空调基本没开但车长时间醒着≈可能哨兵或车不休眠。
